title: Kurum Padame (Version 1) Lyrics Vil Ambu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Karum Padamae (Version 1)
Singer(s): GV Prakash, Vandana Srinivasan
Music: Navin

Kurumpadame uyirgiraai
Thirai veliye kuthikiraai
Aruginiley varugiraai
Mayakangalai tharugiraai

Oli thiralaal izhukiraai
Vizhigalai nee parikiraai
Mayakugiraai ulagathai
Iyakugiraai en idhayathai

Penne Penne
Nee vandha pinne
Konjam thadam maarinen
Anbe Anbe
Nee vandha pinbae
Kaadhal unarndhen

Kurumpadame uyirgiraai
Thirai veliye kuthikiraai
Aruginiley varugiraai
Mayakangalai tharugiraai

Sikki kondu karaindhidum sorkalil
Ulla kaadhal pirikiraai
Oppanaigal neeki vandha sorkalil
Ulla unmai rasikiraai
Vaagai maari odum
Paadal aagindren
kaadhai moodi kondru
Unnai ketkindren
Ennulle!

Kurumpadame uyirgiraai
Thirai veliye kuthikiraai
Aruginiley varugiraai
Mayakangalai tharugiraai

Innum innum azhagenna boomiyai
Undhal kangal maatrudhey
Oh kuviyathin mayyamadhu nee yena
Indha kaadhal maatrudhey
Endhan nera mullil
Pookal pookirathey
Undhal kannil endhan
Kaadhal paarkindren
Moodaathey!

Kurumpadame uyirgiraai
Thirai veliye kuthikiraai
Aruginiley varugiraai
Mayakangalai tharugiraai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kurum Padame (Version 1)?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

GV Prakash Kumar and Vandhana Srinivasan have lent their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Vil Ambu?

The music for the movie was composed by Navin.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vil Ambu, Kurum Padame (Version 1) is a melodious duet that beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Vandhana Srinivasan, the song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics convey the depth of romantic feelings between the characters. The music by Navin enhances the emotional impact, making it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, perfect for moments of reflection and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kurum Padame (Version 1) from the film Vil Ambu, where the soothing voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Vandhana Srinivasan blend seamlessly with Navin's captivating music. This romantic duet captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to your playlist. Dive into the lyrical beauty and emotional depth that this song offers.
stanzaMeanings: Short film, you are alive, jumping out of the screen, coming closer, giving illusions.
You slip through the light waves, you see the eyes, you mesmerize the world, you move my heart.
Girl, girl, after you came, I changed a little. Love, love, after you came, I felt love.
Short film, you are alive, jumping out of the screen, coming closer, giving illusions.

In the words that melt and mix, you separate the love inside. In the words that come without pretenses, you enjoy the truth inside. Changing like a victory, I become a song, closing the story, I ask you inside me!
Short film, you are alive, jumping out of the screen, coming closer, giving illusions.

Still, still, what beauty changes the world, your eyes change it. Oh, you are the center of attraction, this love changes. In my thorny path, flowers are blooming. In your eyes, I see my love. Don't close them!
Short film, you are alive, jumping out of the screen, coming closer, giving illusions.
